records.m_Talk_ENG: After much debate, you came to the conclusion

9u cu87kc tranh lu86{n, ng95pi 96e95s 96ei 96e8691n k8691t lu86{n,
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nach langen 95nberlegungen bist du zum Schluss gekommen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apr958s un long moment de r959flexion et de nombreuses d959lib959rations,

records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.
records.m_Talk_VTN: v87mi s87 suy x959t k8785 c95png, ng98~87oi nh95rn vi95xn n95py l95p ho95pn to95pn c86wn thi8691t cho t98~98qng lai ph95{a tr98~87mc c87wa ng95pi.
records.m_Talk_DEU: dass diese Mitarbeiterin, 9588ber die du so viel nachgedacht hast, absolut unverzichtbar f9588r die Zukunft des Unternehmens ist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: vous 95xtes arriv959 95p la conclusion que cette employ959e 959tait un 959l959ment vital pour votre entreprise et son futur.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you've decided
records.m_Talk_DEU: Daher hast du beschlossen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Vous avez donc d959cid959

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.
records.m_Talk_VTN: r86ng ng95pi s8689 ch87an c9580 86uy, b86ut ch86up h86{u qu86s ra sao.
records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.
records.m_Talk_FRA: de rester 95p ses c9580t959s et la soutenir, peu importe les cons959quences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagte, sie wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What's that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What's that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What's that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A banana? You bought it while thinking of me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A banana? You bought it while thinking of me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A banana? You bought it while thinking of me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought you had something important to say, but you called me in here just for this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought you had something important to say, but you called me in here just for this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought you had something important to say, but you called me in here just for this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well... I like it, so I'll enjoy the banana.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well... I like it, so I'll enjoy the banana.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well... I like it, so I'll enjoy the banana.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? You didn't want to see me because of the banana?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? You didn't want to see me because of the banana?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? You didn't want to see me because of the banana?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A lifetime contract? What's that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A lifetime contract? What's that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A lifetime contract? What's that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait... a lifetime contract means...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait... a lifetime contract means...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait... a lifetime contract means...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey. You're not trying to take advantage of us outsiders with a fishy contract, are you?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey. You're not trying to take advantage of us outsiders with a fishy contract, are you?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey. You're not trying to take advantage of us outsiders with a fishy contract, are you?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that's not it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that's not it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that's not it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You could've just said that without glaring at me. Even if we're close, contracts have to be made carefully.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You could've just said that without glaring at me. Even if we're close, contracts have to be made carefully.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You could've just said that without glaring at me. Even if we're close, contracts have to be made carefully.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fine. Let me read it first, then I'll sign it! Happy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fine. Let me read it first, then I'll sign it! Happy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fine. Let me read it first, then I'll sign it! Happy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is fishy as heck! It's unfair how this contract asks for my trust but not yours!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is fishy as heck! It's unfair how this contract asks for my trust but not yours!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is fishy as heck! It's unfair how this contract asks for my trust but not yours!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! If you want me to sign that, you'll have to sign my contract first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! If you want me to sign that, you'll have to sign my contract first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! If you want me to sign that, you'll have to sign my contract first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Obedient slave?" W-what are you talking about?! It doesn't say anything about that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Obedient slave?" W-what are you talking about?! It doesn't say anything about that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Obedient slave?" W-what are you talking about?! It doesn't say anything about that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It just says... that you have to stay by my side often if you're going to be with me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It just says... that you have to stay by my side often if you're going to be with me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It just says... that you have to stay by my side often if you're going to be with me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait! I think there's another thing I should add. You have to give me two, no three clusters of grapes every day...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait! I think there's another thing I should add. You have to give me two, no three clusters of grapes every day...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait! I think there's another thing I should add. You have to give me two, no three clusters of grapes every day...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? You already signed it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? You already signed it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? You already signed it?
